title: Lovtidend act (one row per published act)
description: One published act from Norsk Lovtidend. Despite the file name, this table contains ALL Lovtidend publications, not just amendments — about 55% are actual endringslover that amend existing laws; the remaining ~45% are new standalone forskrifter, repeals, delegations, decisions, etc. To filter for acts that actually amend something, join on amendments.act_refid (see amendments.schema.json). Sourced from amendment_acts in the snapshot SQLite database, originally parsed from Lovdata XML.

short_title.description: Shorter title for display, often Norwegian abbreviation.

ministry.description: Norwegian ministry that proposed the act.

date_published.description: Date the act was published in Norsk Lovtidend (YYYY-MM-DD).

date_in_force.description: Raw date_in_force field as published. May be a date or a textual description.

is_deferred.description: Whether the act has a deferred entry-into-force.

amendment_count.description: Number of paragraph-level amendments this act made. NOT the number of laws affected; for that, len(targets).

targets.description: List of refids for laws/forskrifter that this act amends.
